title.en: EHT-MCS Data-Rate Tables: RUs, MRUs & DUP Mode
title.zh: EHT-MCS 数据速率表：RU、MRU 与 DUP 模式

blocks.en: Every headline Wi-Fi 7 number — '5.8 Gbps', '46 Gbps' — comes from a table. In 802.11be the PHY defines a set of EHT-MCS data-rate tables (Clause 36.5): one table per channel chunk, listing for each modulation-and-coding scheme (MCS) the exact bits and the resulting megabit-per-second figure. This lesson walks through how a chunk of spectrum, a modulation, a coding rate, and a guard interval combine into that final number — and where the famous peak rates actually live in the standard.
blocks.zh: Wi-Fi 7 的每一个亮眼数字——“5.8 Gbps”“46 Gbps”——都来自一张表。在 802.11be 中，PHY 定义了一组 EHT-MCS 数据速率表（第 36.5 节）：每种信道“块”各一张表，对每一种调制与编码方案（MCS）列出确切的比特数以及由此得出的每秒兆比特数。本课将带你了解一段频谱、一种调制、一个编码率和一个保护间隔是如何组合成那个最终数字的，以及那些著名的峰值速率究竟落在标准的哪个位置。

blocks.en: The 'chunk of spectrum' is a Resource Unit (RU), measured in tones (subcarriers). 802.11be tabulates everything from a tiny 26-tone RU up to a giant 4x996-tone RU, plus the combined multi-RUs (MRUs) that puncture-and-stitch chunks together: 52+26, 106+26, 484+242, 996+484, 996+484+242, 2x996+484, 3x996, and 3x996+484. More tones means more usable subcarriers (NSD), which means more coded and data bits per OFDM symbol — and a higher rate.
blocks.zh: “一段频谱”就是一个资源单元（RU），以“音调”（即子载波）计量。802.11be 把从微小的 26 音调 RU 一直到巨大的 4×996 音调 RU 全部列成了表，还包括把若干块拼接起来的多资源单元（MRU）：52+26、106+26、484+242、996+484、996+484+242、2×996+484、3×996 以及 3×996+484。音调越多，意味着可用子载波（NSD）越多，也就意味着每个 OFDM 符号承载的编码比特和数据比特越多——速率也就越高。

blocks.en: Each table row fixes an MCS index (0-13, plus 14 and 15). The MCS picks a modulation — BPSK, QPSK, 16-QAM, 64-QAM, 256-QAM, 1024-QAM, and Wi-Fi 7's new 4096-QAM — and a coding rate (1/2, 2/3, 3/4, 5/6). Modulation sets NBPSCS, the coded bits each subcarrier carries (1 for BPSK up to 12 for 4096-QAM). Multiply by the number of data subcarriers to get NCBPS (coded bits per symbol), then multiply by the coding rate to get NDBPS (data bits per symbol). Divide NDBPS by the symbol duration and you have the rate.
blocks.zh: 表中每一行都固定一个 MCS 编号（0–13，外加 14 和 15）。MCS 选定一种调制——BPSK、QPSK、16-QAM、64-QAM、256-QAM、1024-QAM，以及 Wi-Fi 7 新增的 4096-QAM——和一个编码率（1/2、2/3、3/4、5/6）。调制决定 NBPSCS，即每个子载波承载的编码比特数（BPSK 为 1，4096-QAM 高达 12）。乘以数据子载波数即得 NCBPS（每符号编码比特数），再乘以编码率即得 NDBPS（每符号数据比特数）。把 NDBPS 除以符号时长，就得到了速率。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 460 210' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><rect x='10' y='20' width='90' height='40' rx='4'/><text x='55' y='38' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>RU tones</text><text x='55' y='52' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>NSD subcarriers</text><rect x='10' y='100' width='90' height='40' rx='4'/><text x='55' y='118' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Modulation</text><text x='55' y='132' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>NBPSCS bits/tone</text><rect x='185' y='60' width='90' height='40' rx='4'/><text x='230' y='78' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>NCBPS</text><text x='230' y='92' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>coded/symbol</text><rect x='185' y='150' width='90' height='40' rx='4'/><text x='230' y='168' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>x coding R</text><text x='230' y='182' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>= NDBPS</text><rect x='355' y='105' width='95' height='40' rx='4'/><text x='402' y='123' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Data rate</text><text x='402' y='137' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>NDBPS / Tsym</text><line x1='100' y1='40' x2='185' y2='72'/><line x1='100' y1='120' x2='185' y2='88'/><line x1='275' y1='80' x2='275' y2='150'/><line x1='275' y1='170' x2='355' y2='130'/></svg>

caption.en: How a row in an EHT-MCS table is built: tones x modulation give coded bits per symbol (NCBPS); coding rate gives data bits per symbol (NDBPS); dividing by symbol duration gives the Mb/s figure.
caption.zh: EHT-MCS 表中的一行是如何构成的：音调数 × 调制得到每符号编码比特数（NCBPS）；编码率得到每符号数据比特数（NDBPS）；再除以符号时长即得每秒兆比特数。

blocks.en: The tables list NSS,u = 1 (one spatial stream) only. To get a multi-stream rate you simply multiply by the number of spatial streams. So the famous EHT peak — 4x996-tone RU, MCS 13 (4096-QAM, 5/6), 0.8 us GI — reads 2882.4 Mb/s in the table for one stream; with 8 spatial streams that becomes roughly 23 Gbps over a single 320 MHz channel.
blocks.zh: 这些表只列出 NSS,u = 1（单空间流）的情形。要得到多流速率，只需乘以空间流数即可。因此著名的 EHT 峰值——4×996 音调 RU、MCS 13（4096-QAM，5/6）、0.8 µs GI——在单流表中读作 2882.4 Mb/s；配合 8 条空间流便约为单条 320 MHz 信道上的 23 Gbps。

blocks.en: Two MCS indices are special. MCS 15 is BPSK with dual-carrier modulation (DCM) — it repeats each bit on a paired subcarrier for robustness, so it appears in every RU/MRU table at half the rate of MCS 0. MCS 14 is different: it is the EHT DUP (duplicate) mode, defined only for 80, 160, and 320 MHz, where the same content is duplicated across 20 MHz subchannels for maximum range and reliability — its own small table (36-87) lists just three rows. Notice MCS 15 is even marked 'Not valid' for some of the largest MRUs.
blocks.zh: 有两个 MCS 编号比较特殊。MCS 15 是带双载波调制（DCM）的 BPSK——它把每个比特在配对的子载波上重复一遍以增强鲁棒性，因此它在每张 RU/MRU 表中都以 MCS 0 一半的速率出现。MCS 14 则不同：它是 EHT DUP（重复）模式，仅在 80、160、320 MHz 下定义，把相同内容在各个 20 MHz 子信道上重复，以换取最大的覆盖范围和可靠性——它有自己的小表（36-87），只列出三行。注意 MCS 15 在某些最大的 MRU 中甚至被标注为“Not valid（无效）”。

720.6 Mb/s] C --> D[2x996 RU

blocks.en: One more table rounds out the picture. While Clause 36.5 covers the user data, Clause 36.6 defines the EHT-SIG MCSs — a tiny, deliberately robust set (BPSK 1/2, QPSK 1/2, 16-QAM 1/2, and BPSK-DCM) used not for payload but for the EHT-SIG control field that tells the receiver how to decode the rest of the PPDU. Low-order modulation there protects the very information needed to interpret everything else.
blocks.zh: 还有一张表让整幅图景更完整。第 36.5 节涵盖的是用户数据，而第 36.6 节定义了 EHT-SIG 的 MCS——一组刻意保持鲁棒的小集合（BPSK 1/2、QPSK 1/2、16-QAM 1/2 以及 BPSK-DCM），它不用于承载净荷，而用于 EHT-SIG 控制字段，告诉接收机如何解码 PPDU 的其余部分。在这里采用低阶调制，正是为了保护那些用来解读其它一切所必需的信息。

summary.en: The exact rate formula and where the numbers come from
summary.zh: 精确的速率公式及数字的来源

blocks.en: Clause 36.5 (page 892) gives the governing relations. Per OFDM symbol, NCBPS,u = NSS,u x NBPSCS,u x NSD,u (coded bits), and NDBPS,u = NCBPS,u x R (data bits, R the coding rate). The data rate D in Mb/s is NDBPS,u divided by (12.8 + TGI,Data) microseconds — the 12.8 us being the EHT OFDM symbol's useful part, plus the guard interval (0.8, 1.6, or 3.2 us), which is exactly why each table shows three rate columns. EHT-MCSs 14 and 15 are supported only with NSS,u = 1; EHT-MCS 14 (DUP) is SU-only and limited to 80/160/320 MHz. Working it through for the 4x996-tone RU at MCS 13 (Table 36-86, page 908): NSD = 3920, 4096-QAM gives NBPSCS = 12 so NCBPS = 47040, coding 5/6 gives NDBPS = 39200, and 39200 / 13.6 us = 2882.4 Mb/s — the single-stream peak. Clause 36.6 (page 909) tabulates the four EHT-SIG MCSs used per 20 MHz subchannel for the EHT-SIG field.
blocks.zh: 第 36.5 节（第 892 页）给出了支配性关系式。对每个 OFDM 符号，NCBPS,u = NSS,u × NBPSCS,u × NSD,u（编码比特数），NDBPS,u = NCBPS,u × R（数据比特数，R 为编码率）。以 Mb/s 计的数据速率 D = NDBPS,u 除以 (12.8 + TGI,Data) 微秒——其中 12.8 µs 是 EHT OFDM 符号的有用部分，再加上保护间隔（0.8、1.6 或 3.2 µs），这正是每张表都有三列速率的原因。EHT-MCS 14 和 15 仅在 NSS,u = 1 时受支持；EHT-MCS 14（DUP）仅用于 SU，且仅限 80/160/320 MHz。以 4×996 音调 RU 的 MCS 13 为例推演（表 36-86，第 908 页）：NSD = 3920，4096-QAM 使 NBPSCS = 12，故 NCBPS = 47040，编码率 5/6 得 NDBPS = 39200，而 39200 / 13.6 µs = 2882.4 Mb/s——即单流峰值。第 36.6 节（第 909 页）列出了用于 EHT-SIG 字段、按每 20 MHz 子信道使用的四种 EHT-SIG MCS。

cites.note: 36.5 Parameters for EHT-MCSs — NCBPS/NDBPS relations, rate = NDBPS/(12.8+TGI), MCS 14/15 restrictions
36.5.1-36.5.17 Tables 36-71..36-87 — per-MCS rate tables for 26-tone RU through 4x996-tone RU, all MRUs, and EHT-MCS 14 DUP mode
36.6 Table 36-88 EHT-SIG MCSs — robust MCS set for the EHT-SIG control field
